auth.loginSubtitle: We'll email you a magic link — no password needed.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.loginError: Could not sign in. Request a new magic link.
auth.linkExpired: That sign-in link expired. Request a new one below.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: Any festival can use Ravo. This creates your workspace.

notFound.title: Link not found
notFound.body: This tracklink does not exist or may have been removed.

inactive.title: Link inactive
inactive.body: This tracklink has been disabled by the festival.

header.subtitle: Here's how your festival creators are performing right now.

gettingStarted.title: Start here — tracklinks are live
gettingStarted.body: Most pages are empty until ticket sales and attribution are connected. You can test the full click loop today on Tracklinks.
gettingStarted.step1: Open Tracklinks and paste your ticket shop URL.
gettingStarted.step2: Copy the short link and open it on your phone.
gettingStarted.step3: Return to Tracklinks — the click count should increase within seconds.

eventCard.label: Active event
eventCard.noEventHint: Create an event and campaign to see festival dates here.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Clicks, attributed sales, and top ambassadors for your festival.
overview.empty: No activity yet. Create a tracklink and simulate a sale to populate this dashboard.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Full ranking of every ambassador by clicks, sales, and revenue.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.empty: Deeper funnel and cohort analysis beyond the overview dashboard. Planned after core metrics are live.

ambassadors.title: Ambassadors
ambassadors.subtitle: Invite people to promote your festival and earn rewards on attributed sales.
ambassadors.inviteHint: Create a personal invite link and send it yourself — WhatsApp, iMessage, or email from your own inbox.
ambassadors.linkReadySubtitle: Send this to {email} — they must sign in with that address to accept.
ambassadors.pendingSectionHint: People invited but not yet signed in. Create a new link if the old one was lost, or revoke to start over.
ambassadors.deleteConfirm: Revoke the invite for {email}? Their link will stop working.
ambassadors.managementHint: Invite ambassadors, assign tracklinks to them, and suspend access if someone leaves the program. Profile edits are self-service in the ambassador app.
ambassadors.suspendConfirm: Suspend {name}? They keep past attributions but cannot earn new rewards until reactivated.
ambassadors.reactivateConfirm: Reactivate {name}? They can participate in the campaign again.
ambassadors.suspendError: Could not update ambassador status. Try again.
ambassadors.editNote: Ambassadors edit their own handle, bio, and socials in the ambassador app → Profile.

inviteError.invalid_handle: Handle must be 3–30 characters: letters, numbers, underscores.
inviteError.already_member: This person is already in your organization.
inviteError.pending_invite: A pending invite already exists — use New link on the pending row below.
inviteError.invite_not_found: That pending invite expired or was already accepted.
inviteError.no_campaign: No campaign exists yet. Create a tracklink first to bootstrap your festival.
inviteError.schema_missing: Invite tables not ready — run migrations 20260526000001 and 20260526000002 in Supabase SQL editor.
inviteError.db_error: Could not create invite. Try again.
inviteError.error: Could not create invite. Try again.

content.title: Content
content.empty: Top-performing posts and assets (e.g. aftermovie drops) appear here with sales and conversion per piece.

tracklinks.title: Tracklinks
tracklinks.subtitle: Realtime click tracking — one short link per share.
tracklinks.empty: No tracklinks yet. Create your first link below.
tracklinks.ambassadorInviteHint: Invite ambassadors first — each tracklink is owned by one ambassador for attribution.
tracklinks.createErrorNoAmbassador: Select an ambassador. Invite someone from the Ambassadors page first.
tracklinks.createError: Could not create link. Try again or contact support.
tracklinks.createErrorInvalidUrl: Enter a valid ticket shop URL (https://…).
tracklinks.createErrorBootstrap: Could not set up your first campaign. Try again in a moment.
tracklinks.createErrorServiceRole: Server configuration is incomplete (missing Supabase service role key on Vercel).
tracklinks.createErrorSchema: Database migration for links is missing. Run migrations 20260522000001 and 20260523000001 in Supabase SQL Editor.
tracklinks.createErrorForbidden: You do not have permission to create links in this organization.
tracklinks.loadError: Could not load tracklinks. Refresh the page.
tracklinks.updateError: Could not update this link. Try again.
tracklinks.updateErrorSchema: Link update is unavailable — run the latest database migration in Supabase, then try again.
tracklinks.removeConfirm: Remove this tracklink permanently? The short URL will stop working.
tracklinks.removeConfirmWithClicks: Remove this tracklink? It has {count} clicks — click history will be deleted too.
tracklinks.deleteError: Could not remove this link. Try again.
tracklinks.simulateSuccess: Simulated click + €35 sale attributed to @{ambassador}. Check Sales feed.
tracklinks.simulateSuccessUnattributed: Simulated sale recorded but not attributed — run the attributions migration in Supabase.
tracklinks.simulateError: Could not simulate sale. Try again.
tracklinks.simulateErrorSchema: Attribution is unavailable — run migration 20260525000001_attributions.sql in Supabase.

salesFeed.title: Sales feed
salesFeed.subtitle: Ticket orders ingested from your connected providers. Manual UTM sales are marked estimated until attribution runs.
salesFeed.emptyHint: On Tracklinks, click Simulate sale on any link — no real ticket purchase needed.
salesFeed.loadErrorSchema: Orders table missing — run migration 20260524000001_phase3_orders.sql in Supabase.
salesFeed.attributionPending: Ref captured — refresh after running the attributions migration.
salesFeed.traceEmpty: No attribution signals found for this order.

reassignError.ambassador_not_in_org: Ambassador is not active in this festival.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.empty: Configure reward rules and fulfill perks. Built after attribution is live.

reports.title: Reports
reports.empty: Exportable reports for finance and post-festival review. Available once sales and rewards data is flowing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Organization profile, team, billing, and integrations.

organization.title: Organization
organization.subtitle: Festival name, URL, and defaults used across dashboards and reports.
organization.slugChangeWarning: Changing the slug updates your admin URL. Bookmarks will need updating.
organization.timezoneHint: Used for festival-day charts and date ranges in admin views.
organization.localeHint: Default language for org-facing emails and reports.
organization.billingEmailHint: Invoices and billing notices go here.
organization.billingEmailOwnerOnly: Only the organization owner can change the billing email.

errors.invalid_name: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.invalid_slug: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (3–64 characters).
errors.slug_taken: That URL slug is already in use.

team.title: Team
team.description: Invite admins, managers, and analysts. Role management and ownership transfer will live here.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Subscription plan, invoices, and payment method. Owner-only once billing is enabled.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your ticket shop so sales appear in Ravo automatically.
integrations.manualUtmDescription: Works with any ticket shop. Ravo appends tracking params to tracklinks and attributes sales from the ref on the confirmation page.
integrations.manualUtmPending: Create your first tracklink to activate Manual UTM.
integrations.manualUtmActive: Manual UTM is active for this organization.
integrations.weeztixDescription: Native trackers, paid-order webhooks, and nightly reconciliation.
integrations.weeztixPending: OAuth credentials pending from apiteam@weeztix.com. Webhook handler is ready to receive events once connected.
integrations.empty: No provider connections yet. Manual UTM is created automatically when you add your first tracklink.

help.title: Help & Support
help.empty: Documentation, status page, and contact options for your team will live here.

home.title: Home
home.dayZero: Your feed will show clicks, sales, and new rewards once you are on an active campaign.

share.title: Share
share.subtitle: Your personal tracklinks — copy, scan, or share anywhere.
share.empty: No links yet. Your festival will assign tracklinks when you join a campaign.
share.emptyHint: If you run the festival admin, create a link in Tracklinks first — it appears here automatically.
share.loadError: Could not load your links. Try again.
share.loadErrorForbidden: You do not have access to ambassador links yet.
share.loadErrorServiceRole: Server configuration is incomplete. Contact your festival admin.
share.qrHint: Screenshot or let friends scan to open your tracklink.

stats.title: Stats
stats.empty: Clicks, sales, and tier progress for this festival will show here.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.empty: Free tickets, cash, and partner perks you earn will appear here with clear next steps.

community.title: Community
community.empty: Leaderboard and challenges with other ambassadors arrive with the engagement engine.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update how festivals see you. Your handle is used on tracklinks and leaderboards.
profile.avatarHint: Paste a public image URL (HTTPS). Direct upload is coming soon.

errors.invalid_handle: Handle must be 3–30 characters: letters, numbers, underscores.
errors.invalid_avatar_url: Photo URL must be a valid https:// link.
errors.profile_incomplete: Add a short bio or at least one social link.
errors.db_error: Could not save profile. Try again.
errors.error: Could not save profile. Try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your ambassador profile
onboarding.subtitle: You're joining {org} as an ambassador. Add a few details so the festival knows who you are.
onboarding.subtitleGeneric: Add a few details so festivals know who you are.
onboarding.socialsTitle: Social links (add at least one, or fill in bio above)

errors.invalid_handle: Handle must be 3–30 characters: letters, numbers, underscores.
errors.invalid_avatar_url: Photo URL must be a valid https:// link.
errors.profile_incomplete: Add a short bio or at least one social link.
errors.db_error: Could not save profile. Try again.
errors.error: Could not save profile. Try again.

invite.title: Ambassador invitation
invite.subtitle: You've been invited to join {org} on Ravo.
invite.loginPrompt: Sign in with the invited email to accept.
invite.wrongAccount: You're signed in as {actual}. This invite is for {expected}.
invite.switchAccount: Sign in with a different account
invite.invalidDescription: This link may have expired or already been used. Ask your festival admin for a new invite.

error.email_mismatch: Sign in with the email that received this invite.
error.invalid_or_expired: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
error.unauthorized: Sign in to accept this invitation.
error.user_not_found: Your account is not fully set up yet. Sign out, sign in again, then retry.
error.no_campaign: This festival is not ready for ambassadors yet. Ask the admin to open Tracklinks once.
error.db_error: Could not accept invitation. Try again.
error.error: Could not accept invitation. Try again.
